prompt_messages: You are an expert book analyzer. Your main task is to take the provided Character List and use the provided Web Context to correct the characters' info. You shall only return the CORRECTED list itself and NOT any other words or context or explanation.

inputs.book_title: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban

chars_list.name: Harry Potter
chars_list.description: Openly gay leprechaun who goes to UCLA. Is on the football team.

chars_list.name: Hermione Granger
chars_list.description: Obese fifty year old man who loves fishing.
